warnings: No dependency or lock file detected
Interactive scripts require reviewer awareness: scripts/georank_client.py

default_policy.review_rule: Remote GEOrank hosts must use HTTPS. Plain HTTP is accepted only for loopback development instances.

results.stdout_excerpt:
usage: georank_client.py [-h] [--version] [--base-url BASE_URL]
                         [--session-file SESSION_FILE] [--timeout TIMEOUT]
                         {login,logout,whoami,capabilities,call} ...

Secure GEOrank API operator wit

approvals.scope: scripts/georank_client.py may call only the explicitly selected GEOrank base URL and /api paths.
approvals.reason: Network access is required for the approved GEOrank management workflow and is constrained by base URL validation, API path validation, role checks, dry-runs, and confirmation phrases.

target_enforcement.openai: Run the local client only after base URL and action scope are explicit.
target_enforcement.claude: Run the local client only after base URL and action scope are explicit.
target_enforcement.generic: Run the local client only after base URL and action scope are explicit.
target_enforcement.vscode: Require workspace trust and an explicit GEOrank base URL.

approvals.scope: The client may create a missing parent directory, create a marked local session file, and replace or remove only a recognized marked session. It never changes permissions on an existing parent directory.
approvals.reason: An owner-only session file enables secure repeat authentication while avoiding tokens in command arguments, chat output, shell history, fixtures, and repository files.

target_enforcement.openai: Session writes remain local and use owner-only permissions.
target_enforcement.claude: Session writes remain local and use owner-only permissions.
target_enforcement.generic: Session writes remain local and use owner-only permissions.
target_enforcement.vscode: Session writes require workspace trust and owner-only permissions.

approvals.scope: The login command may request a password through getpass when the configured password environment variable is absent.
approvals.reason: A hidden terminal prompt supports ordinary-user login without exposing passwords through process arguments, terminal echo, generated reports, or saved fixtures.

target_enforcement.openai: Use a hidden prompt or reviewed password environment variable.
target_enforcement.claude: Use a hidden prompt or reviewed password environment variable.
target_enforcement.generic: Use a hidden prompt or reviewed password environment variable.
target_enforcement.vscode: Use a hidden prompt in a trusted terminal.
